headline: Verisk Redefines U.S. Hurricane Risk Modeling with Reengineered Tropical Cyclone Model, Delivered on Its New Synergy Studio Platform
summary: Integrates advances in climate science, hazard, and vulnerability to improve how tropical cyclone risk is assessed Provides a more realistic view of individual risk and portfolio exposure across insurance, reinsurance, and capital markets Delivered through Verisk’s new cloud-native Synergy Studio platform, enabling high-resolution modeling, high-performance analytics, and scalable workflows JERSEY CITY, N.J., June 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) today announced a major update

headline: Does Verisk (VRSK) Expanding Catastrophe Models Strengthen Its Edge in Insurance Risk Analytics?
summary: In late May 2026, Verisk Analytics expanded its catastrophe risk capabilities by updating its U.S. Tropical Cyclone model on the Synergy Studio platform and adding KatRisk’s multi-peril models to the open, multi-vendor Verisk Model Exchange. These enhancements deepen Verisk’s role at the center of insurance risk analytics by giving insurers and reinsurers more granular, comparable views of physical and cyber catastrophe exposures on a single governed platform. We’ll now examine how the...

headline: A Look At Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Valuation After New Hurricane Model And AI Data Concerns
summary: Why Verisk’s Latest Hurricane Model Matters for the Stock Verisk Analytics (VRSK) has rolled out a reengineered U.S. Tropical Cyclone model on its cloud based Synergy Studio platform, as investors weigh AI related questions around its core data assets. The model integrates updated climate science, hazard, and vulnerability assumptions and is available only through Synergy Studio, which is positioned as Verisk’s newer delivery hub for high performance risk analytics across insurance,...
